summary: Iteration 5 verification — Reset endpoint removed, market-closed trade block, leaderboard visibility toggle. Backend pytest: 11/11 NEW iter-5 tests PASSED (all green). Frontend partial: PortfolioTab reset-btn confirmed removed via UI run #1; warn-market-closed correctly hidden when market OPEN; data-testids verified in code. Admin leaderboard toggle UI flow could not be exercised due to flaky login-button click on second admin/demo run, but backend tests fully validate the toggle persistence + leaderboard exclusion + self-visibility behavior end-to-end. Full pytest 49/53 (4 pre-existing flakes unrelated to iter 5: 3× signup/login rate-limit 429, 1× Yahoo intraday 0-candles).

minor.issue: Pre-existing burst rate-limit (10/60s) causing 3 change-password tests to flake when full suite runs — not caused by iter-5 changes.
Yahoo Finance occasionally returns 0 candles (external dep). Pre-existing.

iter5_backend_tests_added: test_leaderboard_hidden_user_excluded_for_others_but_visible_to_self → admin viewer rows omit demo_user; demo_user `me` still set; toggled-back cleanup OK ✓
test_admin_excluded_from_leaderboard_rows_for_demo_viewer → admin not in non-admin viewer rows ✓
test_admin_applications_includes_leaderboardHidden → bool field present on every row ✓

test_trade_market_closed_block_or_success → market is OPEN (10:48 IST 01-May-2026), BUY succeeded; closed-branch covered by code review (server.py:493-495 raises 400 'Trading is disabled. NSE is currently closed.')

frontend_ui_observations.PortfolioTab_reset_btn: UI CONFIRMED ABSENT — fuzzy 'reset' button text scan returned [] on /portfolio (1st UI run). data-testid 'reset-btn' query → null.
frontend_ui_observations.MarketTab_warn_market_closed: Correctly absent while market OPEN (data-testid='warn-market-closed' → null).
frontend_ui_observations.AdminTab_leaderboard_toggle: Code-verified at /app/frontend/src/components/AdminTab.jsx:51 — data-testid={`admin-leaderboard-toggle-${r.username}`}. Live UI click flaked due to repeat-login button-click issue (clicked but no nav). Backend already round-trips the persisted hidden flag and leaderboard filter — equivalent coverage.
frontend_ui_observations.TradeModal_warn_market_closed: Code-verified — block/disable wired through marketClosed prop. Cannot exercise live while market is OPEN.

action_items: (Optional) Apply a 30–60s server-side TTL cache to /api/prices and rate-limit relaxation for tests, to suppress the change-password 429 flake noted in iters 2/3/5.
(Optional) Add Yahoo intraday fallback when 1d returns 0 candles (e.g., retry with 15m interval).
(Optional) Manually retest admin-leaderboard-toggle UI click since it could not be exercised in this iteration (backend behavior is fully verified).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 962 lines — past 700-line guideline. Continue splitting into routers/{auth,admin,trade,leaderboard,chart}.py.
/api/leaderboard performs N+1 queries (find users + holdings per portfolio) — for 15 fake + N real users this is fine, but consider $lookup aggregation if user count grows.
/api/admin/leaderboard-visibility has no audit log — admin actions on user visibility should be recorded for traceability.

Admin accounts being silently filtered from the public leaderboard rows is a behavior change; ensure this is documented in PRD/UX since the previous test_credentials note that admin 'never expires' implies admin presence in features.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 new iter-5 tests; 49/53 overall — 4 pre-existing flakes)
success_rate.frontend: 75% — reset-btn removal & market-OPEN paths verified; admin toggle click could not be exercised (backend equivalent verified)

test_credentials: admin / SCALEdaddySALLU67  &  demo_user / demo123 — both in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: demo_user leaderboardHidden flag toggled true→false during test — clean state restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tabs use data-testid='tab-{name_lc}'. AdminTab subtabs: admin-subtab-{pending|approved|rejected}. Leaderboard toggle: admin-leaderboard-toggle-{username}. PortfolioTab: holding-sell-{SYMBOL}. MarketTab: buy-{SYMBOL}, sell-{SYMBOL}, open-chart-{SYMBOL}, market-search. TradeModal: warn-market-closed (only when marketClosed=true). Login form has no name attrs — find inputs by [type='password'] vs first text input. Market timing: cache `fetcher.cache.market_status` controls trade block; to exercise CLOSED branch live, monkey-patch via python REPL inside backend container or wait for IST 15:30+. Backend test_trade_market_closed_block_or_success branches on /api/market-status to handle both states.
